content.full_text:
February 24, 2009

Joseph F. Smith
Senior Staff Counsel
Department of Toxic Substances Control
P.O. Box 806
Sacramento, California 95812-0806

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-017

Dear Mr. Smith:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on February 9, 2009.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Sukhi K. Brar
Counsel, Legal Division

SKB:jgl
